notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with UFO, waves, lives, particles, and audio; minor issue is the respawn state shows ship at center but doesn't render it during the wait, and the shoot-during-respawn gap is slightly awkward, but overall mechanics are complete and well-executed.

Solid basic Asteroids implementation with waves, splitting rocks, UFOs and game states, but control/state handling is inconsistent (Escape doubles as pause/title only in some states, respawn flow freezes movement), and gameplay tuning is only moderately polished.
